ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unit ID assigned to the institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_size" INTEGER /* Enrollment size of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, community college) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "location_state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the campus belongs to */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "campus_address" TEXT /* Address of the campus */,
  "campus_size" INTEGER /* Enrollment size of the campus */,
  "campus_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the campus was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campuses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "crime_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category (e.g., Murder, Sex Offenses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Relevant legal statutes or codes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution submitting the report */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the report is for */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the crime report was submitted */,
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category being reported */,
  "incident_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents reported for the crime category */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime report */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or entity reporting the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate calculation */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the crime rate is for */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the crime rate is for */,
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category the rate is for */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the crime rate was calculated */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Calculated crime rate per 1000 students */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size (students, faculty, staff) considered for the rate calculation */,
  "rate_calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the crime rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, institution admin, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution admin */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the admin is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an institution admin */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the admin within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_admins_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_security_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus security authority */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the authority is responsible for */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus security authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the authority */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the authority */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the security authority */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campus_security_authorities_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victim_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim service */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the service is available on */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the victim service */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the service */,
  "service_website" TEXT /* Website or additional resources for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victim_services_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_safety_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus safety policy */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the policy applies to */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus safety policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the campus safety policy */,
  "policy_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy became effective */,
  "policy_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campus_safety_policies_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_crime_prevention_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus crime prevention program */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the program is available on */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus crime prevention program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the campus crime prevention program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program started */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program ends */,
  "program_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the program (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campus_crime_prevention_programs_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)
